over the same fresh generator, same seeds. The
read is the per-round drift contrast between
the two judges — the steering-force profile of
a weak emergent taste (Δ≈0.1, the same
kept-gap scale as K2's measured 0.100 force),
dialed against the loop's own drift.

sharpened the prior: at α 0.75–1.5 the null
is refuted by generic degeneration, so only α
